notes: No regular open issues in the repo. Workflow files (.github/workflows/) are protected. Past changes applied by maintainer directly to master up to aba0042. Two new PRs created this run: test: add snap AY registers and peripheral flag tests (100-102) on branch repo-assist/test-snap-ay-beta-zxatasp-20260416, and refactor: use libspectrum_new0 in microdrive_alloc on branch repo-assist/improve-microdrive-new0-alloc. Build: ./autogen.sh && ./configure --with-fake-glib && make. Tests: make check. Next runs: after PRs merged, consider tests for divide, specdrum, fuller_box, multiface snap fields, tape_accessors, IDE functions.
